\tzpentry{ID3946}{Delta Expectation Value}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3946 introduces Delta Expectation Value as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$\nabla \delta g_{\mu\nu} = \frac{8\pi G}{c^4} \langle \hat{T}_{\mu\nu} \rangle_{TZP} + \nabla \Lambda_{eff}(r)$$
